reviews.review_msg: Good Prof. Talks a lot about life experiences (which he has tons of). Read the book!!!! He got pissed off one time because most of the class didn't. Participate, read the book, and  go to class...that will get you a good grade with Ashok

Great Professor, great class.  If you want to gain a real business world entrepreneurial experience this is the prof and this is the class!  If you just want to memorize crap out of a textbook, then I suggest moving along.  This class and this prof are for those who want to take what they learn to the real world.
he is awesome. Shares real life example which makes the course more interesting . Remember to select a good team partner as it affects your grade later on .Good luck !!!!

If you ever wanted to grab a beer after class with a prof, he is the guy. The coolest prof I have ever had. The class information is invaluable( e.g. learn how to raise money and get investors!). Although class is unco-ord. at times, he tries to snap it back into place. No exams and assignments are not hard at all (actually a bit fun).

Highly Recommended. One of the class you will learn something which you can really apply when you are out to the business world. It will take so much time to finish all the assignments, yet i find they are interesting. Real business stories from the prof.

Decent class if you are one of the typical people who go to class and leave right after. Very easy and frustrating if you have any actual experience. Doesn't push students hard enough. Class seemed uncoordinated at times (very inefficient lectures with non-value-added material - e.g. lots of stuff can be taught one-on-one instead).

Great prof!  Thoroughly enjoyed the class.  He knows his stuff when it comes to the real world and his experiences are really interesting.  I recommend taking this course because it's one of the best you can take in your academic career!!!

Great Prof. ... Works very hard to bring REAL WORLD experience to the classroom. Probably because hes a Real World Business person, not a theoretical business person like so many profs.... The best class i ever took in 6 years at SFU.
Excellent prof, fair, and a good person to know in general.
Super passionate about his students and topics... has lots of great stories. Great guy to have in your network!
Interesting, practical class on entrepreneurship
Best prof ever met at SFU Beedie, know what Innovation looks like and practical into the real case project
Great professor! Helped kick start my career, really cares for the students!
Doug is a nice guy and seems like he truly wants to help his students with their business ideas. However, his grading is extremely arbitrary and can often be very confusing.
She is so inspiring and definitely makes you look yourself in a different way.
Totally agree!!!    Best prof ever!!!! Way to go Ginger! :))

Super cool prof! Probably one of the best class ive ever take  at sfu. Super useful. I saved all his slides and files because it can be applied to many things in the future! Really awesome class and prof if you are serious about starting a business
Best Prof I have ever had. Very successful entrepreneur.

Bernie is a great prof who motivates his students to do their best. He does have high expectations, but if you study hard and work hard he rewards you. He does NOT play favorites as you submit your assignments anonymously which he later correlates to your student ID. One of my favorite profs at SFU, definitely the most knowledgeable.

Bernie is a great teacher who actually cares to learn his students names and their goals.  He genuinely wants to help his students' careers too. Expect to work hard and make sure you have a good group to work with because expectations are high and he'll call you out if you didn't put in enough effort. Overall one of my favourite profs at SFU!
One of the best professors at SFU. Take a class with him!

Overall a great professor; one of the few that has relevant real-world knowledge and work experience. BUS 477 is a challenging but rewarding class. Expect to learn how to actually apply your knowledge. Quizzes are important but don't bother to read the textbook, just look at the slides. A fair bit of work, but well worth it.

Incredibly smart professor, don't be deterred by his stories. He does have high expectations but I think this is one of the most useful classes. He is also very personable. One of my fave profs for sure. Quizzes are extremely important if you want a good mark - mostly from his slides.

477 is a 400 level class so expect lots of team work, but Shaka gives super personal and relevant feedback (true gem)! Sharka also comes from an Entrepreneurial background so she brings in a lot of very inspiring stories about her businesses. Others may say she is a little disorganize, but if you are willing to reach out, she is willing to help!
